name: Vegetable Fritters (Pakora)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the chickpea flour, unbleached all-purpose flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, sea salt, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric, and asafetida (if using).
2. Gradually whisk in cold water and lemon juice until you have a smooth batter with the consistency of heavy cream. Set aside.
3. Heat about 3 inches of oil in a large skillet or deep fryer.
4. Dip the sliced potatoes, cauliflower florets, and chopped bell pepper into the batter to coat them evenly.
5. Carefully lower the coated vegetables into the hot oil using a slotted spoon.
6. Cook, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
7. Remove the cooked pakoras with a slotted spoon and drain on absorbent paper.
8. Keep the pakoras warm by covering them and placing in an oven set to warm while cooking the remaining batch.
